title: Towards Explainable Zero-Shot Learning with Concept Bottlenecks
authors: E. Voss, M. Chen, J. Lee
aboutSentence: We propose concept bottleneck models for zero-shot tasks, improving interpretability by 23% on ImageNet-ZS.

title: Human-Centered Evaluation of Generative Agents
authors: E. Voss, S. Park, K. O'Brien
aboutSentence: A mixed-methods study on user trust and mental models of LLM-based agents.

title: Ethical Alignment in Large Language Models: A Survey
aboutSentence: Systematic review of 150+ papers on AI alignment, bias mitigation, and value learning.

title: Interactive Machine Learning for Digital Humanities
aboutSentence: Explores co-creative interfaces between historians and neural models for archival analysis.

title: Workshop on Trustworthy AI @ ICML 2023: Proceedings Paper
aboutSentence: Short paper discussing reproducibility benchmarks for explainable AI.

title: Bayesian Approaches for Interpretable Time Series
aboutSentence: Probabilistic models to uncover latent regimes in healthcare time-series data.
